candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs directly below revenue.

candidates.why: Core overhead personnel cost and clear SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is amortization, not a dedicated R&D operating expense; excluded by rule.
Balance sheet capitalized R&D asset, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense line is reported on the income statement. The only R&D-related income statement line is amortization, which should be excluded.

candidates.why: Contains interest plus FX/other financing items; too broad if granular interest lines exist.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Debts and Borrowings
candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense on debt; best core XINT component.

candidates.why: Recurring lease interest; valid additional financing cost component.
Minority profit attribution, not interest expense.

candidates.why: Duplicate supplemental disclosure of same lease interest; avoid double counting.

Liability balance, not interest expense.

Only one equity component, not total parent equity.

Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred.
Shareholder count, not equity amount.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent
